page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.2xlarge is an x86_64 architecture instance belonging to the ecs.r9ae server family. It is powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz. The instance features 8 dedicated physical cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio, providing 8 vCPUs. It is equipped with 64.0 GB of system memory, yielding an allocation of 8.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance utilizes the KVM hypervisor for virtualization. It does not include any local storage or integrated GPU hardware, meaning all storage requirements must be met through external network-attached volumes. For network connectivity, the instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

With its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.r9ae.2xlarge is classified as a memory-optimized instance. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing performance without resource sharing. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive workloads such as relational databases, in-memory caching systems, data analytics, and enterprise applications that require a larger memory footprint relative to compute resources.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.r9ae.2xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by an AMD EPYC 9T95 processor running at 2.25 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 8 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core, delivering 8 vCPUs alongside 64.0 GB of RAM, which establishes a high 1:8 vCPU-to-memory ratio. Virtualized via the KVM hypervisor, this instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage. It offers a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. The dedicated CPU allocation and high memory density make this instance suitable for memory-intensive workloads, including in-memory databases, caching layers, and enterprise applications requiring stable compute performance without resource contention.
